title: Weight Converter - kg, lbs, oz, stones & More
description: Free weight unit converter. Convert between kilograms, pounds, ounces, stones, and grams instantly.
keywords: weight converter, kg to lbs, pounds to kg, ounces to grams, stone converter
intro: Convert between all common weight units: kilograms, pounds, ounces, stones, grams, metric tons.

faq.q: How many pounds in a kilogram?
faq.a: 1 kilogram = 2.20462 pounds. To convert kg to lbs, multiply by 2.20462.

faq.q: How many kg in a stone?
faq.a: 1 stone = 6.35029 kilograms. Stones are commonly used in the UK for body weight.
